node.html:
• Develop, and Design analytic dashboard system, for continuous monitoring of deployed chatbot models and customer input using, ReactJS framework as the FrontEnd UI, SpringBoot for user management, and FastAPI for analytics API
  • Create pipelines for Data Preprocessing for incremental training of chatbot models
  • Creating CI using MyPy, Black, Flake8 and GitHub Actions for CD
  • Using Kafka for exchanging messages between microservices
  • Tools: ReactJS, SpringBoot,FastApi, PostgreSQL, GithubActions, Kafka, Kubernetes

• Lead the development of Anti-Spoofing system to verify the user authentication in M-Bansos Apps
  • Lead the development of internal verification system for multiple onboarding merchant process, which use OCR using Tesseract on various merchant documents

• Build chatbot on customer dashboard, based on Transformer model, using Sanic Framework for Socket & API Request
  • Deploy chatbot on cloud development environment using Docker, Nginx & Ali Cloud Kubernetes Cluster
  • Creating automatic script pipelines for Local development & Cloud deployment using Bash Scripting.
